name: Cole Hefner

contactInfo.office: Texas Capitol Extension, Room E2.910, Austin, TX 78701

bio: Cole Hefner represents House District 5 in the Texas House of Representatives, serving communities in Hopkins, Rains, Van Zandt, Wood, and Camp counties. A lifelong East Texan and small business owner, Hefner has served in the legislature since 2017. He is a strong advocate for rural economic development, property tax reform, and conservative values in the Texas House.
campaignPromises: Cut property taxes and limit local government spending
Support East Texas agriculture and small businesses
Protect gun rights and oppose federal overreach
Improve rural roads and transportation infrastructure
Defend traditional Texas values and religious liberty
